infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: We read your workouts and active calories to calculate your daily energy balance.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: We write nutrition data to your Health app.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We use the camera to photograph your meals for AI nutritional analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We read photos from your library when you choose to log a meal from a picture.
